about.label: My Story
about.title: From the shores of Costa Rica to the frontier of software.
about.p1: I grew up on the Pacific coast of Costa Rica, a place that shaped my roots and gave me a deep love for this world. From early on, technology fascinated me. Before coming to the US, I dedicated two years of my life serving a mission, helping people, learning to listen, and growing in ways I never expected. My family has been the foundation of everything: they've supported, pushed, and believed in me to become not just what I want to be, but what I've always dreamed of.
about.p2: That journey brought me to the United States, where I'm pursuing Computer Science at BYU-Idaho while I earned an Associate's in Business Statistics at BYU. I've maintained a 3.98 GPA not because I'm chasing numbers, but because I genuinely love learning.
about.p3: Over the past few years I've gone from writing automation scripts at Verizon, to engineering integrations at BYU that save over $110K annually, to helping millions of FamilySearch users with reliable software, and co-founding Impulsa, a platform that scaled to tens of thousands of users. Data science and AI are woven into everything I build: I believe the best engineers understand both the system and the story behind the data.
about.p4: When I'm not writing code, you'll find me on Rainbow Six, or spending time with the people I love most. I believe in shipping fast, learning faster, and never losing sight of what matters.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: A track record of delivering real impact across engineering, data, and product.

experienceItems.title: Software Developer
bullets: Architected a data-patching workflow integrating Genesys, iPaaS, and JavaScript to append metadata to 2,000+ daily tickets, performing complex data analysis using Python to enable linear regression modeling.
Delivered 350+ system integrations and revamped 30+ Power BI reports across 15+ departments, helping 100,000+ users and driving data-informed decisions that saved $110K+ annually.

Designed and implemented an AI-driven system that extracts Knowledge Base articles into Markdown, optimizing data ingestion for LLM integration to securely manage 5,000+ weekly interactions with high accuracy.
Consolidated a modular CSAT platform via TypeScript, condensing 21 disparate flows into one unified interface.
Accelerated survey delivery speeds by 93% by re-engineering and streamlining complex backend workflows.

experienceItems.title: Co-Founder
bullets: Founded and scaled a comprehensive productivity platform to 18,000+ active users, securing strategic partnerships with Toyota, Microsoft, Google, and Instituto Joule to modernize enterprise workflows.

Pitched comprehensive business models to stakeholders to secure capital funding, subsequently hiring a dedicated engineering team to drive a rapid Spanish-market expansion and accelerate global user acquisition.
Developed the core infrastructure using React, Expo, and Node.js, engineering robust real-time tracking features that successfully surged task completion by 76% and mitigated user churn by 32%.

experienceItems.title: CS Teaching Assistant
bullets: Validated cloud-native AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes architectures, enforcing strict serverless scaling compliance, optimizing resource allocation, and establishing industry-standard deployment practices across complex software.

Instructed 100+ students in advanced HTML, CSS, and JavaScript principles, leveraging multi-level interactive teaching strategies to maximize overall coding proficiency, frontend performance, and core understanding.
Facilitated CI/CD and IaC best practices, streamlining submission workflows for over 1,000 automated assignments.

experienceItems.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Orchestrated 100+ automated releases via C# and Azure Functions as the primary QA engineer to ensure rigorous platform reliability, mitigating deployment risks and achieving zero critical downtime for 13.7M global end-users.

Transitioned manual testing protocols to fully automated, end-to-end continuous integration pipelines across C#, Java, and Python architectures, successfully expanding overall test coverage to 97% while eliminating bottlenecks.
Refactored 10,000+ lines of legacy code, boosting system performance by 36% via optimized Azure test suites.

experienceItems.title: Researcher
bullets: Optimized complex enterprise data pipelines utilizing R, SQL, Snowflake, and Python, effectively integrating 87% of required predictive analytics models to drive data-informed decision-making and accelerate strategic initiatives.

Revamped CRM UI/UX architectures to increase staff productivity by 34% across 5,000+ client records through heavily enhanced data accessibility, intuitive dashboard visualizations, and streamlined navigation protocols.

experienceItems.title: IT Tier 3 Technician
bullets: Directed Tier 3 IT operations for Verizon's Visible division as the top-performing technical lead, managing a cross-functional team to simplify internal operational delivery and elevate resolution metrics.
Programmed a custom C#/ASP.NET integration tool for JIRA, amplifying internal team output by 78% and drastically reducing overall project turnaround times by 34% across regional deployments.
Fortified core security architectures and linked MTAS/MSAT with Salesforce, generating $148K in annual savings.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Things I've built, from AI-powered apps to systems-level tools.
projects.private_notice: This project is private or maintained under another organization.

projectItems.description: From feeling to meaning. An AI-powered reflection app that processes real-time sentiment and delivers daily personal insights.
projectItems.longDescription: Built during BYU Hackathon, Phronesis is an Expo/React Native mobile app backed by Node.js and Firebase that processes over 1,000 user reflections. The app uses AssemblyAI for real-time sentiment analysis, delivering insights in under 5 seconds, and achieved a 41% correlation in its AI dashboards for 100+ active users.

projectItems.description: Military-grade AES-256-GCM encryption for 6,000+ files with automated folder monitoring and CLI management tools.
projectItems.longDescription: A Rust-based CLI application that watches directories for changes and automatically encrypts/decrypts files using AES-256-GCM. Features robust key management, background processing, and configurable sync via API or local LAN. Decreased manual input by 87% while securing thousands of files.

projectItems.description: Led 7 workshops on Python, R, Tableau, and Power BI for 80+ participants, uncovering $11K in annual inefficiencies.
projectItems.longDescription: A comprehensive data analytics initiative where AI/ML optimization models and reports were used to uncover operational inefficiencies worth $11,000 annually. Applied predictive modeling to drive data-informed decisions, and conducted workshops for 80+ participants on dashboard design and data pipelines.

projectItems.description: A collaborative roommate chore tracker built with Expo and Firebase for shared task ownership.
projectItems.longDescription: RoomiesChore is a collaborative mobile app built with React Native, Expo, and TypeScript that helps roommates create groups, assign chores, and track shared responsibilities. It includes Firebase authentication, Firestore real-time sync, due dates, priorities, and a cross-platform dashboard for iOS, Android, and web.

projectItems.description: An interactive global map that visualizes emotions from social posts and text messages in real time.
projectItems.longDescription: A real-time data visualization platform built in Go that aggregates emotional sentiment from social posts and text messages and renders them on a live, interactive global map. Emotisphere transforms raw text data into geographic emotional insights, providing a unique lens on the world's collective mood.

projectItems.description: TypeScript/Node.js integration layer syncing JSON through TDX API, cutting manual processing by 88%.
projectItems.longDescription: An automated TypeScript/Node.js application that syncs knowledge base articles through the TDX API, doubling data precision. Orchestrated an automated scraper and integration layer for Genesys, and engineered a module for position-based prompt activation from real-time schedules, transforming operational flow.

projectItems.description: A 2D Godot game focused on movement, coins, platforms, and clean gameplay loops.
projectItems.longDescription: Stardew Like is a 2D platformer built in Godot where players move through levels, collect coins, avoid killzones, and use moving platforms to complete objectives. The project includes pixel-art visuals, sound effects, and a clear gameplay loop, and serves as a focused game development project in GDScript.

projectItems.description: Do sentiments matter in the current financial world? A Python-powered analysis of crypto market sentiment vs. price.
projectItems.longDescription: A data science project exploring the relationship between social sentiment and cryptocurrency market performance. Using Python and NLP techniques, the project analyzes whether public sentiment on social media platforms has a statistically significant correlation with price movements in crypto markets.
